name: Vampiric Touch
description: Make a melee spell attack against one creature within reach. On a hit, it takes 3d6 Necrotic damage and you regain Hit Points equal to half the necrotic damage dealt. Until the spell ends you can repeat the attack as a Magic action on each of your turns. Engine: the attack + damage resolve; the self-heal for half the damage is descriptive only until a leech rider lands.
scaling: The damage increases by 1d6 for each spell slot level above 3.
